privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how SSAMOK SOFT ("we", "us") collects, uses, and protects information across our apps and this website. It applies to all SSAMOK SOFT applications unless a specific app provides its own notice.
privacy.s1_body: Our apps are designed to work with as little personal data as possible. Depending on the app, we may process: basic device information and identifiers, app usage and diagnostics, and advertising identifiers used to serve ads. We do not sell your personal information.
privacy.s2_body: Some apps display ads through Google AdMob. Ad providers may use device and advertising identifiers to deliver and measure ads. You can reset or limit ad tracking in your device settings.
privacy.s3_body: We use collected information to operate and improve our apps, provide support, keep our services secure, and — where applicable — show relevant advertising.
privacy.s4_body: We keep information only as long as needed for the purposes above. You may request access to, or deletion of, your data by contacting us. Store platforms (Google Play, App Store) also provide their own privacy controls.
privacy.s5_body: Our apps are not directed to children under the age required by local law, and we do not knowingly collect their personal information.
privacy.s6_body: For any privacy question or request, contact us at ssamoksoft@gmail.com.
privacy.draft_note: Draft template — review with legal counsel before publishing.
